feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model
feed.subtitle: ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP Fiori ALP - Visual Filter does not work when many records
entry.content:
Hi Community!

I am having a problem with Fiori Analytical List Page (ALP).

I created a project to display some charts based on the data we have (Dumps), it starts working properly with a small amount of data, however when the data is more realistic it starts failing. For example: Less than 200 records. Everything is working fine!



More than 200 records: Visual Filters does not load any more and above 700 records approx the main chart does not load anymore.



I am learning about this technology, so I am not sure what the problem is

I was thinking in maybe limit these charts to the top N values

Visual Filter: Top 3-5 or Last 5 records.
Bar Chart: Top 20 records

But not sure if that will help me to solve it and also I don't know if is possible.

Thanks!

entry.title: RAP cl_csp_act_read_from_db has a bug
entry.content:
Hi 

cl_csp_act_read_from_db - execute 

Has statment  IF lines( lrt_loaded->* ) > lines( ct_unread_key ) in read keys. Should this not have be >= 

Dump if read table with one row in it 😞 

Br. 

Anna

entry.title: ABAP: Installation Guide
entry.content:
Dear SAP-Community,

Quite new to ABAP, however the whole installation process is a bit interesting.

Is there a quick guide to install everything a for it to be within the framework of it being a free trail ?

Some additional questions:

1. How to install SAP GUI

entry.title: Using ABAP RAP, show radio buttons in a popup
entry.content:
Hi,
I have a simple requirement to show a popup containing four radio buttons using ABAP RAP.

First Try
I tried to use abstract entity and was able to show the popup with Input & CheckBox but cannot find a suitable datatype that renders a Radio button.

If there exist a suitable data type that renders radio button, it would be one of the easiest solution.

SecondTry
I tried to use a custom CDS enumerated type in my abstract entity but discovered that it is not supported.
Yes, we do have other options of extending the Fiori element in BAS using UI5 or Flexible Programming model but I want to avoid that and find a solution within RAP itself.

entry.title: ABAP RAP Use of Custom Enity as Association
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have build a CDS entity ZC_MAIN_CDS with some fields , like DepartmentUserId.

That CDS has an association with custom CDS ZCE_USER_INFO like $projection.DepartmentUserId = _UserInfo.UserID.

The custom entity ZCE_USER_INFO is implemented with an ABAP class, and tested and works fine.

I have exposed the ZCE_USER_INFO in the behavior definition. I m not sure of this is needed.

The issue I have is to present fields of the Custom Entity  in my screen. For instance DepartmentUserId together with name comming from ZCE_USER_INFO. 

For other associations with CDS view entities, that works fine.

The call the Odata in the backend using ?$expand works correctly with populating fields of ZCE_USER_INFO.

Is there any solution for this issue? or any link for the solution?

Thank you

 

 

The issue was that used drop down . issue solved by using value help

entry.title: Eclipse ABAP ADT - New Cloud Project - No option for 'SAP BTP ABAP Environment'
entry.content:
I've installed latest Eclipse and ABAP ADT. I did the pre-reqs specified here https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/#abap

However when I go to create an ABAP Cloud project I don't see an option to choose 'SAP BTP ABAP Environment'.

I only see 'Specify the ABAP service instance for connecting to the cloud environment.' ABAP service Instance URL.

I've attached image of expected popup with BTP option as well as the screen I get where its missing. Also is my Eclipse and ADT version.

entry.title: ABAP RAP: Upload data from Excel file
entry.content:
Hi,

 

I was wondering if it is possible to upload the data from an Excel file  without saving the rawstring data in the database?  without any modification on the front-end.

In most tutorial what I have seen, the attachment content is saved in a database tabel.

Thanks in advane

entry.title: Select checkbox automatically in RAP based Fiori Elements App
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I have developed one app using RAP and my requirement is I need to select all items related to one PO and post some operation. And there possibility to select multiple POs item. 
Now I have to select all checkbox manually one-by-one for a PO.  Which is not good. My question is
Is it possible instead of selecting checkbox one by one , any possibility to select one checkbox under one PO and remaining records related to that PO will be select automatically ? 

Any CDS Annotation will solve this ?

Can you please help me on this ?

 

 

ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model
SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment 

SAP Fiori Elements 

@CarineTchoutouo  @Andre_Fischer

entry.title: Issue in Creating SAP Fiori Elements List Report Using Parameterized CDS View using OData V4 UI
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are currently developing a Fiori Elements List Report based on a parameterized CDS view in RAP. We have created a parameterized consumption CDS view and binding it using an OData V4 UI service. 

While generating the Fiori Elements List Report application, only the parameters are visible in the App as output fields, and no filters are available. While executing it, we are getting the below error.

 

Below is the CDS View which is created. The parameters are exposed from the base level CDS

@AbapCatalog.viewEnhancementCategory: [#NONE]
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'Consumption View for Proj Fin Report'
@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: true
@ObjectModel.usageType:{
    serviceQuality: #X,
    sizeCategory: #S,
    dataClass: #MIXED
}
@Metadata.allowExtensions: true
@VDM.viewType: #CONSUMPTION
define view entity ZPTD_C_PROJ_FIN_REP
  with parameters
    p_bukrs      : bukrs,
    p_perio_from : co_perio,
    p_perio_to   : co_perio,
    p_gjahr_from : gjahr,
    p_gjahr_to   : gjahr,
    p_pc1        : versn,
    p_pc2        : versn
  as select from ZPTD_I_PROJ_FIN_REP( p_bukrs:$parameters.p_bukrs,
                                      p_perio_from:$parameters.p_perio_from ,
                                      p_perio_to:$parameters.p_perio_to ,
                                      p_gjahr_from:$parameters.p_gjahr_from ,
                                      p_gjahr_to:$parameters.p_gjahr_to,
                                      p_pc1:$parameters.p_pc1 ,
                                      p_pc2:$parameters.p_pc2  )
{

While creating an OData V2 service, it is working, and the report is showing all the filters and data is displayed.

Is there any workaround to achieve this using OData V4? We are on S4HANA OP2023 version.

Thanks,

Faiz

entry.title: Enhance Your RAP Application with CDS View Extensions
entry.content:
Introduction

In SAP ABAP RAP (Restful ABAP Programming) development, CDS View Extensions are a powerful technique to enhance existing CDS views without modifying the original SAP or custom definitions. Whether you're adding extra fields, annotations, or associations, extensions keep your core logic clean and upgrade-safe.

Just Understanding the Concept of CDS View Extensions with the simple requirement. 

      Why Use CDS View Extensions? 

  • No modification of the original CDS views (SAP-delivered or custom). 

  • Enhancements are upgrade-proof. 

  • Clean separation of concerns between standard delivery and custom logic. 

    Business Requirement

    In the Travel Booking RAP application, the customer wants to display the agent’s name and a checkbox for 'Approval Needed' on the list page. 

    1.Existing database Table. 

@EndUserText.label : 'Travel'
@AbapCatalog.enhancement.category : #EXTENSIBLE_ANY
@AbapCatalog.tableCategory : #TRANSPARENT
@AbapCatalog.deliveryClass : #A
@AbapCatalog.dataMaintenance : #RESTRICTED
define table ztravel_header_7 {

  key client    : abap.clnt not null;
  key travel_id : sysuuid_x16 not null;
  customer_id   : abap.numc(10);
  booking_date  : abap.dats;
  @Semantics.amount.currencyCode : 'ztravel_header_7.currency_code'
  total_amount  : abap.curr(15,2);
  currency_code : abap.cuky;
  zz_agent_name : abap.char(40);

}

2.Existing CDS( Main). 
make Sure the Annotations is there or not. 

@AbapCatalog.viewEnhancementCategory: [#PROJECTION_LIST]   

@AbapCatalog.extensibility.extensible: true 

 

@AbapCatalog.viewEnhancementCategory: [#PROJECTION_LIST]
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'Travel CDS'
@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: true
@ObjectModel.usageType:{
    serviceQuality: #X,
    sizeCategory: #S,
    dataClass: #MIXED
}
@Metadata.allowExtensions: true 
@AbapCatalog.extensibility.extensible: true

define root view entity ZI_TravelBooking_7
  as select from ztravel_header_7
//  association [0..1] to I_Currency as _Curreextensibilityncy on $projection.CurrencyCode = _Currency.Currency
{
  key travel_id     as TravelId,
      customer_id   as CustomerId,
      booking_date  as BookingDate,
      @Semantics.amount.currencyCode : 'CurrencyCode'
      total_amount  as TotalAmount,
      currency_code as CurrencyCode,
      zz_agent_name as ZzAgentName
//      _Currency
}
​

3.Create a CDS View on the Extension Table. 

Right Click on Data Definition and Choose the ExtendViewEntity

Created the Extend View

extend view ZI_TravelBooking_7 with ZI_TravelBooking_ext {

  ztravel_header_7.zz_agent_name,
  case
    when ztravel_header_7.total_amount > 5000 then 'X'
    else ' '
  end as ZZapproval_needed

}
​

 

4.Add the Fields in the Main Projection View. 

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'Travel Booking'
@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: true
@Metadata.allowExtensions: true
@AbapCatalog.extensibility.extensible: true
define root view entity ZC_TravelBooking
  provider contract transactional_query 
as projection on ZI_TravelBooking_7
{
    key TravelId,
    CustomerId,
    BookingDate,
    @Semantics.amount.currencyCode : 'CurrencyCode'
    TotalAmount,
    CurrencyCode,
    ZzAgentName  ,
    ZZapproval_needed
    /* Associations */
//    _Currency
}


5.Add the UI Annotation on the Metadata. 

@Metadata.layer: #CORE
@UI.headerInfo: {
  typeName:        'Travel',
  typeNamePlural:  'Travels',
  title:        { value: 'TravelId' },     
  description:  { value: 'CustomerId' }  
}

annotate view ZC_TravelBooking with
{
  .facet: [{
      id:           'General',                 
      label:        'Traveling Data',
      type:         #IDENTIFICATION_REFERENCE,
      purpose:      #STANDARD,
      position:     10
  }]

  .lineItem:        [{ position: 10 }]
  .identification:  [{ position: 10, label: 'Travel ID' }]
  .selectionField:  [{ position: 10 }]
  @EndUserText.label:  'Travel ID'
  TravelId;

  .lineItem:        [{ position: 20 }]
  .identification:  [{ position: 20, label: 'Customer ID' }]
  @EndUserText.label:  'Customer ID'
  CustomerId;

  .lineItem:        [{ position: 30 }]
  .identification:  [{ position: 30, label: 'Booking Date' }]
  @EndUserText.label:  'Booking Date'
  BookingDate;

  .lineItem:        [{ position: 40 }]
  .identification:  [{ position: 40, label: 'Total Amount' }]
  @EndUserText.label:  'Total Amount'
  TotalAmount;

  .lineItem:        [{ position: 50 }]
  .identification:  [{ position: 50, label: 'Currency Code' }]
  @EndUserText.label:  'Currency Code'
  CurrencyCode;

  .lineItem:        [{ position: 60 }]
  .identification:  [{ position: 60, label: 'Agent Name' }]
  @EndUserText.label:  'Agent Name'
  ZzAgentName;
  
  .lineItem:        [{ position: 70 }]
  .identification:  [{ position: 70, label: 'Approval Needed' }]
  @EndUserText.label:  'Approval Needed'
  ZZapproval_needed;

}​

  • 6.Output Preview see the new field Approval Needed is added. 

     


    7.Conclusion 

    CDS View Extensions provide a robust, flexible way to adapt your applications to changing business needs — without modifying the original logic or affecting stability. This technique is especially crucial in RAP-based developments where clean, upgrade-safe extensions are key to long-term maintainability. 

    #ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model
    #https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-rap/extending-cds-view

entry.title: SAP Std API Odata V2 Consumption via Service Consumption Model
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

I am in an "SAP S/4 Private cloud (10/2024) without BTP". Focus is clean core. For a given Standard Odata V2 API ( eg Business Partner A2X) how to consume this API?

1: Typical way through SEGW & Service implementation is discouraged as it does not support cleancore . To keep it simple , I dont want to implement anything in Tier3. 

2: I cannot consume it via Service Consumption model as this supports only V4. Moreover, I dont even the see the option of Odata during Service consumption model generation.  Creating Service Consumption Model | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Not able to find /LRN/S4D400_EXERCISE package
entry.content: I'm currently going through the Acquiring Core ABAP Skills course. As part of the exercises, I'm required to use the package /LRN/S4D400_EXERCISE. However, I'm unable to find this package in the system, despite following all the steps correctly. Could you please guide me on how to access or add this package?

entry.title: Best Approach ABAP BTP and SAP S/4 hana Public Clouc Integration
entry.content:
HI Guys, i would like to know that is the best approach for followiung scenarion:

Im devoping a RAP application on ABAP BTP (header/item), during save/post i will call and API on my public cloud to create a Document.

On my Header/Items i have standart fields like Company(Bukrs), Mateiral(MATNR), Account(HKONT).

What is the best approach to retrieve search helps for that fields based on my backend sap s/4hana Public Cloud System?

thanks

entry.title: RAP: Modify column values in Object page items table via custom action
entry.content:
Hello,

I need to mass modify column values on Object Page table items with values inserted from a  Dialog:

After pushing the Apply button, the new date will be updated in the items tables for the selected rows.

What I did:

- to insert the button at the toolbar level, I used BAS Page Map. Manifest.json has been modified accordingly:

In the controller generated, I implemented the logic to open the dialog:

the problems arise in the logic to handle the OK button. I need to get the selected rows and to pass them to the RAP custom action logic:

How can I get the currently selected Items in the Object Page table and how to pass these as parameters to the RAP object ?

 

Many thanks

Filippo

entry.title: Move selection screen parameters data to my table fields
entry.content:
Dear SAP users,

I have a question, I want to copy the values of fields in ly selection-screen to the fields of my custom table.

For the selection screen, I have 

PARAMETERS: p_bukrs like T001-BUKRS OBLIGATORY . 

SELECT-OPTIONS: so_budat FOR ACDOCA-BUDAT OBLIGATORY.

And I have a custom table with fields:

COMPANY_CODE DATA ELEMENT BUKRS

DATE_HIGH DATA ELEMENT DATE

DATE_LOW DATA ELEMENT DATE

Now I want to copy the data of selection screen like this:

COMPANY_CODE =  p_bukrs 

DATE_HIGH = so_budat-high 

DATE_LOW = so_budat-low

I wrote some code, I did a point debug and I found that it come with data for p_bukrs, so_budat-high andso_budat-low but when it come to sy-subrc it give me 4

FORM move_data.
  LOOP AT gt_alv INTO DATA(ls_alv).
    DATA: gt_alv8 TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ztfi_affec_a,
          gs_alv8 TYPE ztfi_affec_a.

    SELECT * FROM ztfi_affec_a INTO TABLE gt_alv8
      WHERE company_code = p_bukrs
        AND date_low >= so_budat-low
        AND date_high <= so_budat-high.

    LOOP AT gt_alv8 INTO gs_alv8.
      gs_alv8-date_high    = so_budat-high.
      gs_alv8-date_low     = so_budat-low.
      gs_alv8-company_code = p_bukrs.
         IF sy-subrc = 0.
           ENDIF.

      SELECT SINGLE * FROM ztfi_affec_a INTO @DATA(ls_exist)
        WHERE company_code = @GS_alv8-company_code
         AND date_high = @GS_alv8-date_high
          AND date_low = @GS_alv8-date_low.

      IF sy-subrc = 0.
        UPDATE ztfi_affec_a FROM gs_alv8.
      ELSE.
        INSERT ztfi_affec_a FROM gs_alv8.
      ENDIF.
    ENDLOOP.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

entry.title: What's the future of SAP technical consultant?
entry.content:
With the introduction of next-generation technologies like SAP BTP, ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model (RAP), SAP Build (LCNC tools), and SAP Joule (AI), it's clear that SAP is moving towards a clean core, cloud-based future.

However, in reality, many organizations are still operating on legacy ABAP systems, and real-world adoption of these new tools remains limited. With the end of ECC support by 2027, this gap raises some concerns.

❓Key Questions:

1. What is the realistic future for SAP technical consultants in this evolving landscape?

2. Is it practical to invest time in RAP, BTP, or AI tools, given the current slow adoption?

3. Are any real projects or clients actively implementing these technologies?

Would appreciate insights from those currently working on RAP or BTP-based projects or involved in modern SAP implementations.

Thank you!

entry.title: Behavior definition for Abstract entity
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I am calling an abstract entity on click of a custom action using the following in BDEF of my business object.

action ( features : instance ) custom_button parameter Z_ABSTRACT_ENTITY.

I would like to know if I can hide/show other fields based on the value input in the first field on the abstract entity.

thanks in advance.

entry.title: "Method not Allowed" when posting Fixed Asset API
entry.content:
I'm trying to create a Fixed Asset using OData v4 https://api.sap.com/api/sap-s4-CE_FIXEDASSET_0001-v1/resource/Fixed_Asset in Public Cloud.

I've created a service consumption model and try to use POST method. However, I'm getting a "Method Not Allowed" error.

I think error is due to the uri path should contain "/SAP__self.CreateMasterFixedAsset" but I cant find a way to squeeze in this path. Coz when I tested using postman with this uri path, it works.

How can I add the mentioned uri path when calling service consumption model?

ls_business_data = VALUE #(

company_code = <lfs_asset>-CompanyCode

* master_fixed_asset = 'MasterFixedAsset'

* fixed_asset = 'FixedAsset'

asset_is_for_post_capitali = abap_false

asset_class = <lfs_asset>-AssetClass

fixed_asset_description = 'FixedAssetDescription'

fixed_asset_assgmt = VALUE #( ( company_code = <lfs_asset>-CompanyCode

validity_end_date = '99991231'

validity_start_date = cl_abap_context_info=>get_system_date( )

cost_center = <lfs_asset>-CostCenter

profit_center = <lfs_asset>-ProfitCenter

segment = <lfs_asset>-Segment ) ) ).

 

" Navigate to the resource and create a request for the create operation

lo_request = lo_client_proxy->create_resource_for_entity_set( 'FIXED_ASSET' )->create_request_for_create( ).

 

DATA(lo_data_description) = lo_request->create_data_descripton_node( ).

lo_data_description->set_properties( lt_prop_asset ).

 

DATA(lo_item_child) = lo_data_description->add_child( 'FIXED_ASSET_ASSGMT' ).

lo_item_child->set_properties( lt_deep_prop_assign ).

 

lo_request->set_deep_business_data(

io_data_description = lo_data_description

is_business_data = ls_business_data

).

 

" Execute the request

lo_response = lo_request->execute( ).

 

" Get the after image

lo_response->get_business_data(

IMPORTING

es_business_data = ls_business_data

).

entry.title: How to link screen-painter element to custom table
entry.content:
Hi,

I created an input field using screen painter name 'DATE_AGO' with search helper 'BU_DATE_CHAR', I chose the search helper because I want it like under date format. I have declared in the TOP include a global variable DATA: DATE_AGO TYPE SY-DATUM. 

Now  when I run my project, and I fill that field with date, when I click on enter it automatically clear by it's self, and when I run the debug and I point on the variable name it's empty 00000000.

Here's the affectation of the variable data to the field of my custom table:

 gs_affec_a-date_ago = date_ago.

DATA: DATE_AGO TYPE SY-DATUM.

Please note that I'm not using any clear or something that let the variable be cleared automatically.

entry.title: load child entity when Create button is clicked in RAP Unmanaged draft based application
entry.content:
I have Root R, Composition child C.

My requirement is that whenever 'create' button at R is clicked, child entries should be automatically created and shown on UI in draft state, rather than after activated.

I do not want to add a new button for loading child entries. I am on SAP S/4HANA on-prem 2023 system. I tried using determinations, side effects. But they did not work.
